description: Apigee Registry is a Google Cloud service for storing and managing machine-readable API descriptions, versions, specs, deployments, and related metadata. The documentation notes this legacy API is no longer supported and recommends Apigee API hub APIs for current functionality.
summary: Apigee Registry exposes one legacy Google Cloud REST API at `https://apigeeregistry.googleapis.com/`, authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens, plus access through the `gcloud` CLI.
